body: The numbers in your last shareholder letter make the argument for me. Retention climbed all year, but new-logo growth has slipped for the third straight quarter, and your board has clearly started to notice the trend.
The newspaper in this box leads with exactly that gap. Every figure in it is drawn from your own filings and from three analyst notes published since March.
Your reps are not the problem. The issue is reach. The buyers who move this number no longer open cold email, and they screen every call from a name they do not already know.
I build one-of-one physical pieces for that exact moment, when the channel itself has to carry the weight the message alone no longer can.
The last one I sent opened a real conversation with the CEO of VINCI Construction. I will follow up by email later this week with something specific.
